fn main() {
    let proto_path = std::env::var("PROTO_FILE").unwrap();
    let contents = std::fs::read_to_string(&proto_path).unwrap();
    let code = generate_code(&contents);
    let out_dir = std::env::var("OUT_DIR").unwrap();
    let out_path = format!("{out_dir}/generated.rs");
    std::fs::write(&out_path, code).unwrap();
}

fn generate_code(_proto: &str) -> String {
    "// generated".into()
}
